creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #5)
Why add another variable to the Makefile, when there is already a configure argument that does exactly what we want? If you do side-by-side comparison of the builds with CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--verbose vs. MAKE_ENV+=VERBOSE=1, you will see that the configure script prints out some relevant information and suppresses useless warnings in the latter case.
